$description: Avatar component tokens — circular identity surface for person/entity representation. Uses the accent-bold fill tier for colorized initials variants. Image variant has no background fill. All initial/foreground pairs verified WCAG AA.

avatar.$description: Circular container showing initials or a photo. Colorized variants use accent-bold backgrounds with matching on-* foreground tokens.

sm.$description: Small avatar — 24px. Dense layouts, inline mentions, table cells.

md.$description: Medium avatar — 32px. Default list items, comment threads.

lg.$description: Large avatar — 40px. Profile headers, featured items.

xl.$description: Extra-large avatar — 48px. Account settings, user profile pages.

default.$description: Neutral avatar background — elevated surface for unknown/placeholder users.

indigo.$description: Indigo accent-bold fill. Pair with foreground.accent-on-indigo (white, 7.98:1 AAA).

sky.$description: Sky accent-bold fill. Pair with foreground.accent-on-sky (white, 5.90:1 AA).

green.$description: Green accent-bold fill. Pair with foreground.accent-on-green-bold (white, 5.47:1 AA).

amber.$description: Amber accent-bold fill. Pair with foreground.accent-on-amber-bold (white, 5.02:1 AA).

default.$description: Initials text on the neutral background. 8.0:1 AA.

indigo.$description: Initials on indigo-bold fill — white, 7.98:1 AAA.

sky.$description: Initials on sky-bold fill — white, 5.90:1 AA.

green.$description: Initials on green-bold fill — white, 5.47:1 AA.

amber.$description: Initials on amber-bold fill — white, 5.02:1 AA.
